test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies the health endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: create_author_successfully
test_cases.description: Verifies creating a new author with valid data returns the created author.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name_returns_422
test_cases.description: Verifies creating an author without the required name field returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving an existing author by ID returns the author details.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_returns_404
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving a non-existent author ID returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies deleting an author with no associated books succeeds.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_returns_409
test_cases.description: Verifies deleting an author who has associated books returns a conflict error.

test_cases.name: create_book_successfully
test_cases.description: Verifies creating a new book with valid data returns the created book.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn_returns_409
test_cases.description: Verifies creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a conflict error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving an existing book by ID returns the book details.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving a soft-deleted book returns a 410 Gone error.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Verifies soft-deleting a book succeeds.

test_cases.name: delete_already_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies deleting a book that is already soft-deleted returns a 410 error.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies restoring a soft-deleted book returns the restored book.

test_cases.name: restore_not_deleted_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies restoring a book that is not deleted returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Verifies applying a valid discount to a book published over a year ago returns the discounted price.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies applying a discount to a book published less than a year ago returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: increase_book_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies increasing a book's stock quantity via delta returns the updated book.

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies decreasing stock by a delta that would result in negative stock returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: add_review_to_book
test_cases.description: Verifies adding a review to a book returns the created review.

test_cases.name: add_review_to_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies adding a review to a soft-deleted book returns a 410 error.

test_cases.name: create_order_with_sufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies creating an order with items that have sufficient stock succeeds and reduces stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies creating an order for a book with insufficient stock returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_valid_transition
test_cases.description: Verifies updating an order status through a valid state transition succeeds.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies attempting an invalid state transition (e.g., pending to delivered) returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_confirmed_order
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving an invoice for an order in a confirmed/shipped/delivered state succeeds.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_pending_order_returns_403
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving an invoice for a pending order returns a 403 Forbidden error.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_partial_success_returns_207
test_cases.description: Verifies bulk creation where some books succeed and some fail returns a 207 Multi-Status response.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_without_api_key_returns_401
test_cases.description: Verifies bulk creation without the required API key returns a 401 Unauthorized error.

test_cases.name: enable_maintenance_mode_with_api_key
test_cases.description: Verifies enabling maintenance mode with a valid API key succeeds.
